## 1 · Grant of License

You ("Player") are granted a non-exclusive · non-transferable · revocable license to :

- Install · run · benchmark · screenshot · record · stream · publish reviews of this alpha build
- Use the binary on any number of personal devices you own or control
- Provide feedback to Apocky (subject to feedback-license below)

## 2 · Restrictions

You may NOT :

- Redistribute the binary or any of its contents to third parties
- Reverse-engineer · decompile · or extract proprietary substrate code · KAN weights · render-pipeline shaders · or 6 novelty-path implementations
- Use any extracted code or models in derivative works · including but not limited to other games · AI services · or research publications without separate written permission
- Resell · sublicense · or commercially exploit this alpha

## 3 · Open-Source Components

The CSSL language specification · csslc compiler · MIR · parser · lexer · code-generator · and all spec/grand-vision/*.csl design documents at github.com/Apocky/CSSL3 are separately dual-licensed under MIT/Apache-2.0. This EULA does NOT restrict your use of those components.

The following are proprietary and covered by this EULA :

- The game binary (`LoA.exe`) and all data files within this distribution
- Trained KAN-substrate weights (when shipped in future versions)
- Render-pipeline shaders (compiled SPIR-V form)
- Coherence-Engine evaluation function · Mycelial-Network protocol implementation · Σ-Chain consensus implementation
- All proprietary 6-novelty-path implementations (Wave-Unity · Spectral · Fractal-Amp · Gaze-Collapse · HDC-Bound-Lenia · Mise-en-abyme)

## 4 · Sovereignty · Privacy · Telemetry

This software is **sovereign-respecting by design** :

- No DRM · no rootkit · no kernel-driver · no anti-cheat-spyware
- All player state is LOCAL by default (`%APPDATA%/LoA/` or equivalent · OS-keychain for keypair)
- Cross-user sharing is OPT-IN per-event-grain · NEVER all-or-nothing
- Sensitive data (biometric · gaze · face · body) is structurally banned at compile-time

If you opt-in to cross-user features (Σ-Chain · Mycelium · Akashic-Records · Multiplayer) :

- Each event is Ed25519-signed by your local sovereign-keypair
- You can revoke any cap unilaterally at any time
- You can export all your data (GDPR / CCPA full-archive) at any time
- You can delete your account with 30-day grace · all public-imprints anonymized post-delete

If you provide feedback · bug reports · suggestions · or modifications to Apocky (via email · GitHub issues · Discord · or any other channel) · you grant Apocky a perpetual · royalty-free · worldwide · non-exclusive license to use that feedback in the development of LoA and future Apocky-projects · with or without attribution.

## 8 · Refunds

Alpha is currently free to test. When paid tiers launch (v1.0) :

- 14-day-no-questions-asked refund window via Stripe automated process
- Jurisdictional-mandated rights respected (EU 14-day · UK 14-day · CN 7-day · etc.)
- In-game content (Aetheric-Shards spent · Akashic-imprints made) prorata-refundable within window
- Earned-currency (Stabilized-Essence) is NOT refundable (it's earned through play · not purchased)

## 9 · Termination

This license terminates automatically if you violate any of its terms. Upon termination · you must delete all copies of the binary. Sections 5 (Disclaimer) · 6 (Limitation of Liability) · 7 (Feedback) · and 10 (Governing Law) survive termination.
